<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-67" location="lines:67-71" -->
```bash
  ADMIN_TOKEN=$(docker exec splice-onboarding \
    jwt-cli encode hs256 --s unsafe --p '{"sub": "app-user", "aud": "https://canton.network.global"}')
 
  echo $ADMIN_TOKEN

```
